name: Tuna Party Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water.
2. Heat chili sauce to boiling point.
3. Remove from heat and add softened gelatin, stirring until completely dissolved.
4. Add lemon juice.
5. Chill mixture until it is partly congealed.
6. Fold in mayonnaise, whipped cream, olives, celery, and tuna.
7. Pour into a two-quart casserole dish.
8. Refrigerate until the salad firmens.
